texto: How marvelous it was to stand in a place like the Soviet Union and talk about the coming kingdom and to tell them that Communism will not win. I told them capitalism would not win either
autor: it’s the kingdom of God that is going to win.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it’s the kingdom of God that is going to win.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “How marvelous it was to stand in a place like the Soviet Union and talk about the coming kingdom …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, billy-graham, billy-graham-in-quotes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de billy-graham-in-quotes.
